events.text: Create a file called /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt with the text 'hello world'

events.content: You must read file /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt before overwriting it. Use the Read tool first

<path>/tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: goodbye world

(End of file - total 1 lines)
</content>

events.text: Edit the file /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt and change 'hello' to 'goodbye'

metadata.diff:
Index: /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt
===================================================================
--- /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt
+++ /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt
@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
-hello world
\ No newline at end of file
+goodbye world
\ No newline at end of file

events.text: Read the file /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt and tell me its contents

events.content:
<path>/tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: goodbye world

(End of file - total 1 lines)
</content>

events.text: Draw a simple mermaid flowchart with 3 nodes: Start -> Process -> End. Use a mermaid code block.

mermaid
flowchart TD
    Start --> Process --> End
